name: America'S First Network
description_short: Unable to verify current services — website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing access to company details, offerings, and membership information.
description_long: America's First Network (AFN) is listed as a payday-alternative provider, suggesting it operates as a credit union or CDFI offering lower-cost borrowing options. The company's website domain (afncu.com) indicates a credit union affiliation, which would align with the payday-alternatives category if it offers Payday Alternative Loans (PALs) or similar products under 36% APR. However, without access to the actual website content, specific details about their loan products, membership requirements, rates, terms, and service offerings cannot be verified. The 403 Forbidden error prevents confirmation of whether AFN operates as a traditional credit union with full banking services, a specialized lending platform, or a membership-based alternative lender. This access restriction significantly limits the ability to assess the company's current business model, competitive positioning, or consumer offerings. Until the website becomes accessible, any claims about AFN's services, eligibility criteria, or product features remain unverified.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
cons: Website currently inaccessible (403 Forbidden error) — no verification of current services possible
Cannot confirm membership requirements, eligibility criteria, or application process
Unable to verify interest rates, loan amounts, terms, or repayment structures
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Cannot provide a factual diagnosis — the company's website is not accessible. Before using this profile, verify current operations by contacting AFN directly, checking the NCUA database (if a credit union), or visiting an alternative URL to confirm services and legitimacy.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
